_note: Language backstory validation rules — applied during DDB sync. See setting-authenticity.json for the underlying setting rules.

autoApprove.Common: Maps to Latin — auto-approved for all characters

requireBackstory.Elvish: Requires specific connection to elven community
requireBackstory.Draconic: Requires explicit dragon connection or Kobold race or Americas heritage
requireBackstory.Infernal: Requires specific patron or infernal heritage
requireBackstory.Abyssal: Requires specific demonic patron or extraplanar contact
requireBackstory.Celestial: Requires angelic patron or sacred order initiation
requireBackstory.Giant: Requires northern frontier or giant communities exposure
requireBackstory.Goblin: Requires direct contact with goblinoid communities
requireBackstory.Orc: Requires direct contact with orcish communities
requireBackstory.Halfling: Requires direct contact with halfling communities
requireBackstory.Dwarvish: Requires direct contact with dwarven communities
requireBackstory.Gnomish: Requires direct contact with gnomish communities

americasLanguagesForbiddenForHumans.rule: Human characters cannot speak Americas languages under any circumstances without explicit DM override
americasLanguagesForbiddenForHumans.rationale: No European human in 1274 has had contact with the Americas. This is an absolute rule in the AI context.

validationStatuses.approved: Language is active in the world for this character
validationStatuses.unavailable: Language exists mechanically but not active in the world
validationStatuses.pending: Backstory required — language inactive until resolved
